name: Claude Historian MCP
what_it_does: Claude Historian MCP server enabling AI agents to search and retrieve past Claude conversation history — indexing and querying previous Claude chat conversations, finding relevant past discussions, and surfacing historical context to enhance current agent sessions with persistent conversation memory.
use_cases: Searching past Claude conversations for relevant prior discussions from memory agents
Finding previous solutions and code from historical context agents
Building on past decisions and reasoning from continuity agents
Extracting patterns from historical conversations from learning agents
Cross-session knowledge retrieval for long-running projects from research agents
Indexing and searching Claude.ai conversation exports
not_for: Teams without Claude.ai conversation export access
best_when: A Claude power user wants their AI to remember past conversations — providing cross-session memory by indexing exported Claude conversation history for semantic search.
avoid_when: You don't use Claude.ai extensively or prefer session-level context management.

auth.notes: No authentication — reads local Claude conversation export files. Must export conversations from Claude.ai manually.

pricing.notes: Free community MCP. Requires Claude.ai account for conversation exports.

known_agent_gotchas: Claude.ai conversation exports must be manually downloaded — not automatic sync
Conversation export format may change with Claude.ai updates
Community MCP — limited maintenance from individual contributor
Search quality depends on indexing approach (keyword vs semantic)
Large conversation histories may be slow to index initially
Privacy consideration — all past conversations are processed locally
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local conversation data. No credentials. Community MCP. Past conversations contain potentially sensitive info — stays local. Private data handled locally.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local data. No credentials. Privacy: past conversations processed locally. Community MCP.
